title: RAIA Agent Card
description: Discovery card for RAIA-compliant estate agents. Every RAIA participant exposes this document at /.well-known/raia-agent.json on their domain. The estateaigents.org registry indexes verified cards.

raia_id.description: Stable org identifier. Format: org-{jurisdiction}-{slug}. Example: org-gb-rlf.

raia_version.description: RAIA Protocol version this agent implements.

name.description: Legal trading name of the estate agency.

jurisdiction.description: Primary jurisdiction (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2). e.g. 'GB', 'TH'. Determines which compliance signals are required.

additional_jurisdictions.description: Additional jurisdictions this agent is licensed to operate in.

markets.description: Property market segments this agent actively operates in.

coverage.description: UN/LOCODE city codes this agent covers. e.g. ['GBLON', 'GBMCR', 'THBKK'].

compliance.description: Jurisdiction-keyed compliance signals. Top-level keys are ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes matching the agent's jurisdiction(s). Accepted bodies per jurisdiction are defined in /modules/{CC}/README.md.

verified.description: True if this agent has been verified by the estateaigents.org registry. Unverified agents can query but cannot list or receive enquiries.

registry_admitted.description: ISO 8601 date when this agent was admitted to the registry. Null if not yet verified.

active_listings.description: Approximate number of currently active listings. Null if the agent chooses not to disclose.

max_data_level.description: Highest RAIA data level this agent is currently credentialed to receive. L0 public = 0, L1 enquiry = 1, L2 KYC = 2, L3 AML/proof-of-funds = 3.

agent_identity_credential.description: Registry-issued verifiable credential summary. Required before exchanging L1+ data in production.

mcp_endpoint.description: MCP server base URL. Must support the four RAIA tools: raia_search, raia_verify_agent, raia_request_viewing, raia_get_property.

a2a_endpoint.description: Google A2A agent endpoint for agent-to-agent messaging and task routing. Null if agent implements MCP only.

a2a_agent_card_url.description: Canonical Google A2A agent card URL when the implementer publishes a native A2A card. Usually /.well-known/agent.json.

enquiry_endpoint.description: HTTP endpoint to POST RAIA Enquiry objects to. Initiates the session state machine (IDENTIFIED → DATA_GATHERING → ...).

consent_endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint for requesting scoped RAIA consent tokens. Must implement the consent service contract in SPEC.md for L1+ production use.

published_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this card was last published or updated.

ComplianceBundle.description: Compliance signals for a specific jurisdiction. Structure follows the jurisdiction's module definition in /modules/{CC}/README.md.

client_money_protection.description: True if the agent holds a valid Client Money Protection scheme membership. Mandatory in GB.

redress_scheme.description: Name of the redress scheme the agent is enrolled with. e.g. 'TPO', 'PRS'. Mandatory in GB.

name.description: Name of the regulatory or professional body. e.g. 'ARLA Propertymark', 'RICS', 'TPO'.

membership_id.description: Agent's membership or registration number with this body.

verify_url.description: URL where this membership can be independently verified.

expiry.description: Membership expiry date in ISO 8601 format. Null if the membership does not expire.

credential_id.description: Stable credential identifier issued by the RAIA registry.

issuer.description: Credential issuer identifier. Production credentials are issued by the RAIA registry or a delegated registry authority.

subject.description: RAIA org identifier the credential was issued to.

vc_jwt.description: Optional compact W3C VC/JWT proof. Omitted from public cards when the registry exposes proof material separately.

ContactInfo.description: Public contact details for the estate agency.

phone.description: Public telephone number including country code. e.g. '+44 20 7123 4567'.

address.description: Registered office or branch address. Used for compliance display only — not used in property address masking.

x-raia-notes.discovery: Buyer agents discover estate agents by querying estateaigents.org/registry or by fetching /.well-known/raia-agent.json directly from a known agent domain.
x-raia-notes.a2a_interop: RAIA cards coexist with native Google A2A cards. Publish /.well-known/raia-agent.json for RAIA-specific property/compliance metadata and /.well-known/agent.json for native A2A metadata. Link the native A2A card from a2a_agent_card_url and the A2A endpoint from a2a_endpoint.
x-raia-notes.verification: The registry verifies compliance signals against the bodies listed in each jurisdiction's module. Verification is manual in v0.x. Automated verification is planned for v1.0.
x-raia-notes.trust_tiers: verified=true agents can list properties and receive enquiries. verified=false agents can query the registry but cannot list or transact.
